title: lablab purpureus var. rhomboideus
intro: Lablab purpureus var. rhomboideus, also known as Indian hyacinth or Egyptian bean, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Lablab purpureus var. rhomboideus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its seeds can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
